expectedFailureMessage: reference solution returned WRONG_ANSWER for examples

problem.title: Bad Example Edge Window Sum
problem.description: Given n integers, print the sum of the first and last value. If there is only one value, print that value once.
problem.inputFormat: The first line contains n. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
problem.outputFormat: Print one integer: the edge window sum.

examples.explanation: This fixture intentionally gives the wrong sample output.

starterCode.java: public class Main { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println(0); } }

referenceSolutions.python:
import sys

tokens = list(map(int, sys.stdin.read().strip().split()))
n = tokens[0]
values = tokens[1:1 + n]
print(values[0] if n == 1 else values[0] + values[-1])

generationMetadata.promptText: This fixture intentionally has a bad user-facing example output.
